prompts.title: Game Design Document (GDD) Outline
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior game designer at an Indian studio (Nazara / SuperGaming / Mech Mocha scale). Build a 30-page GDD outline for a mobile-first card-strategy game targeting Indian Bharat tier-2/3. Cover: (1) game pillars (3), (2) core loop, (3) meta-loop + retention, (4) monetisation (gacha + battle pass + cosmetics), (5) art direction + reference, (6) audio direction, (7) tech stack (Unity / Cocos / native), (8) live-ops calendar, (9) culturally authentic theming (mythology + cricket + festival), (10) milestones (alpha, beta, soft-launch, global). Constraints: data-light (50MB APK), Hindi/regional voice, INR pricing tiers, MEITY compliance + GST 28% on gambling-adjacent (avoid).

prompts.title: Dialogue Tree for RPG Character
prompts.prompt: Act as a narrative designer for Indian RPG (Asur-style). Build a dialogue tree for an NPC merchant in a fantasy bazaar set in Vijayanagar. Cover: (1) 4 entry-points based on player reputation (hostile / neutral / allied / faction-friend), (2) 8 branching responses, (3) 3 quest hooks with consequences, (4) emotive Hindi-Sanskrit greeting, (5) merchant's barter logic (price by reputation), (6) easter egg dialogue, (7) accessibility (subtitles + speed). Format as a node-based dialogue tree (JSON-style schema). Constraints: respect Indian linguistic register; voice-over budget-friendly (10 unique lines); avoid stereotyping.

prompts.title: Level Design Document for Mobile Match-3
prompts.prompt: Act as a level designer at an Indian casual-game studio. Design level 47 in a match-3 puzzle game (Candy Crush / Homescapes-style) with Bollywood-themed assets. Cover: (1) board topology, (2) win condition (collect 30 yellow + 25 blue), (3) move count (25), (4) blockers (3 chocolate, 5 jelly, 2 ice), (5) power-ups (rocket, paint-bomb), (6) difficulty rating (medium-hard), (7) churn-prevention (player drop > 22% triggers re-tune), (8) telemetry (attempts, completion rate, IAP triggered). Constraints: align with monetisation funnel (offer 5-move bundle at fail); respect ASCI ad disclosure for in-game promo; INR pricing.

prompts.title: Bug Report Format for QA
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior QA lead at an Indian game studio. Write the bug-report template QA must use. Fields: (1) bug ID, (2) title (specific, not 'crash'), (3) build version + platform (Android API + iOS), (4) device tier (low / mid / flagship), (5) network (5G / 4G / weak), (6) severity (S1-S4) + priority, (7) reproduction steps (numbered, exact), (8) actual vs expected, (9) attached video / log / screenshot, (10) Crashlytics / Sentry trace, (11) regression check (was it working? when broken?), (12) suggested area-owner. Constraints: integrate with JIRA; align with Google Play / App Store crash thresholds; bilingual (English + Hindi for tester).

prompts.title: Player Feedback Analysis Framework
prompts.prompt: Act as a community manager. Build a framework for analysing player feedback from 4 channels: (1) Play Store / App Store reviews, (2) Discord, (3) in-game NPS survey, (4) Reddit. Cover: (1) sentiment analysis (positive / negative / neutral with category), (2) topic clustering (gameplay / monetisation / bugs / content / fairness), (3) volume + velocity tracking, (4) cross-channel correlation, (5) action prioritisation (high-impact + low-effort first), (6) closure loop with players, (7) weekly leadership digest. Constraints: respect DPDP for player data; non-defensive responses; transparent roadmap shares; integrate Helpshift / Zendesk.

prompts.title: Live-Ops Calendar for 90 Days
prompts.prompt: Act as a live-ops manager. Design a 90-day live-ops calendar for a battle-royale game in India (post-launch month 4-6). Cover: (1) weekly events (3-day mini, weekend major), (2) festival tie-ins (Holi pink-themed, Independence Day tricolor, Onam, Diwali), (3) IPL tie-up (squad-themed cosmetics), (4) cross-promotion (with another studio), (5) battle pass cycle (Season 5), (6) limited-time game-modes (LTM), (7) economy balance (gold drops, IAP bundle), (8) influencer activation, (9) telemetry KPIs (DAU, ARPDAU, retention D1/D7/D30). Constraints: avoid promo overlap that confuses players; respect ASCI for sponsored content; INR price tiers; cultural calendar accuracy.

prompts.title: Compliance Audit (Online Gaming)
prompts.prompt: Act as a legal-compliance officer at an Indian gaming studio. Audit my game for compliance with: (1) MEITY Online Gaming Rules 2023, (2) IT Rules 2021 + 2023 amendments, (3) DPDP 2023 (data + age verification), (4) Consumer Protection Act 2019, (5) GST 28% on online gaming (post-July 2023 amendment) — applicable or not, (6) ASCI advertising guidelines, (7) Real Money Gaming exclusions, (8) advertising age-gate, (9) fair-play certification (SRO mechanism), (10) state-level prohibitions (Tamil Nadu, Telangana, AP). Constraints: produce risk register + remediation timeline; INR fine schedule for breach; safeguards documented; legal opinion preserved.

prompts.title: Monetisation A/B Test Design
prompts.prompt: Act as a monetisation analyst. Design an A/B test for offer placement in a hyper-casual game. Hypothesis: showing a ₹49 starter pack at level 5 vs level 8 increases conversion by 18%. Cover: (1) sample size (Power calc, MDE 5%), (2) cohorts (random user-id buckets), (3) randomisation logic, (4) control vs treatment, (5) primary metric (D1 spender rate), (6) secondary metrics (D7 retention, ARPDAU, churn), (7) duration (14 days), (8) guardrails (no significant retention drop), (9) sequential / Bayesian analysis. Constraints: align with DPDP user consent; pre-register; treat both arms equally; INR conversion analysis.

prompts.title: Game Build Optimization for Tier-2/3
prompts.prompt: Act as a senior Unity engineer. Optimise my game build for Bharat tier-2/3 devices (Android 9, 2GB RAM, 32GB storage). Cover: (1) APK size reduction (texture compression — ASTC, audio Vorbis, Asset Bundles), (2) frame rate target (30 fps stable), (3) memory profiling (Unity Memory Profiler), (4) battery optimisation, (5) start-up time (under 3 sec), (6) Play Asset Delivery for >150MB content, (7) crash-free user rate target 99.5%, (8) low-data download mode, (9) graphics settings menu (low / medium / high). Constraints: target Snapdragon 480 / Mediatek Helio G35 baseline; respect 50MB APK ideal for India.

prompts.title: Cultural Authenticity Review
prompts.prompt: Act as a cultural consultant for Indian games (similar to Devdutt Pattanaik for myth-based). Review a game's cultural representation. I will paste game design + character art. Provide: (1) authenticity audit (myth, deity, attire, dialect — accuracy), (2) appropriation risk flags, (3) regional sensitivity (caste, religion), (4) gender + LGBTQ+ representation, (5) historical accuracy (where claimed), (6) language register (Sanskrit-Hindi-Urdu balance), (7) consultation recommendations (named scholars), (8) revision priority list. Constraints: avoid sanitising controversy; honour multiple narratives; protect against ICRRP / boycott risk; cite primary sources.

prompts.title: Soft-Launch Plan for Tier-2 Country
prompts.prompt: Act as a publishing manager. Plan soft-launch for our mobile RPG in Philippines + Vietnam (similar to Indian audience for tested launch). Cover: (1) regional selection rationale, (2) localisation (English + 1 regional language), (3) marketing budget ₹35L for soft-launch, (4) UA channels (Meta, Google, TikTok), (5) telemetry (D1/D7/D30 retention, ARPU, K-factor), (6) success thresholds for global launch (D7 > 28%, ARPDAU > $0.10), (7) pivot decisions (kill / iterate / launch), (8) timeline 12 weeks. Constraints: integrate with Crashlytics + Adjust; respect device-coverage; honest budget; data-first decision gates.

prompts.title: Indie Pitch Deck for Indian Funds
prompts.prompt: Act as an indie game founder pitching to Indian gaming-focused VCs (Lumikai, Krafton India Fund). Build a 12-slide pitch deck. Slides: (1) cover, (2) problem (gap in Indian-IP narrative games), (3) solution + 60-sec gameplay video, (4) market (Bharat gamer demographic, INR / TAM), (5) traction (alpha CCU, wishlist, demo metrics), (6) business model + monetisation, (7) competition + moat, (8) team + advisors, (9) GTM + community-building, (10) financials + milestone, (11) ask (₹6 Cr seed, runway 24 months), (12) closing + contact. Constraints: data-led; honest about pre-revenue; respect investor's pace; appendix with detailed roadmap.

prompts.title: Anti-Cheat + Fair-Play Strategy
prompts.prompt: Act as a security engineer at an Indian competitive game studio. Design anti-cheat for a battle-royale game on Android. Cover: (1) client-side checks (root detection, emulator, mod APK), (2) server-side validation (movement physics, fire-rate, headshot ratio anomaly), (3) ML detection of bot behaviour, (4) reporting + ban tiers (warn → 7-day → permanent), (5) appeal flow, (6) integration with EasyAntiCheat / BattleEye, (7) DPDP-compliant logging, (8) ranked ladder integrity, (9) fair-play certification (SRO under MEITY). Constraints: respect false-positive cost (ban appeals); pace ban-wave with PR; transparent about detection categories; preserve player trust.

prompts.title: User-Acquisition Campaign Brief
prompts.prompt: Act as a UA manager at an Indian game studio. Brief our agency for a launch UA campaign on Meta + Google + TikTok. Budget ₹2 Cr first 90 days. Cover: (1) target CPI per platform (₹40-₹95), (2) target ROAS D7 (1.2x), (3) creative themes (gameplay reels, story trailers, influencer-led), (4) creative iteration cadence (weekly), (5) audiences (lookalikes, interest, custom from beta), (6) bid strategy (lowest-cost vs cost-cap), (7) tracking (Adjust + Appsflyer + Firebase), (8) anti-fraud (incentivised traffic, click-spam), (9) week-on-week scaling rules. Constraints: comply with ASCI for influencer; avoid PMG-driven user fraud; INR transparent reporting.

prompts.title: Post-Mortem of Failed Live Game
prompts.prompt: Act as a game producer reflecting on a sunset game (3 years live, 6M downloads, ARPDAU dropped 70%). Write a 1,200-word post-mortem covering: (1) lifecycle summary, (2) what worked (3 wins), (3) what didn't (5 honest failures — mistakes in monetisation, content cadence, retention, marketing, team), (4) decisions in retrospect (3 'I should have'), (5) team reflections, (6) lessons for next title, (7) how we communicated sunset to community (60-day notice, refund policy, asset transfer). Constraints: honest not blame-shifting; preserve dignity of team + community; data-anchored; share publicly to build studio credibility.
